overall.description: First-person exploration gameplay through a dimly lit cyberpunk-style apartment or safehouse. The player character walks through narrow corridors, enters two different bedrooms, and explores a common area with a large aquarium, featuring realistic lighting and detailed environmental clutter.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow hallway leading to small cluttered bedroom

events.description: player interacts with door handle to open the first room
enters small bedroom with warm lamplight and messy floor
exits first room back into dark corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching a metal door, opening it, and stepping into a dimly lit bedroom with a single desk lamp illuminating clutter

entered.detail: dark metal door with silver handle showing 'Open' interaction prompt
single bed with gray and white striped bedding against the wall
warm yellow desk lamp illuminating papers and clutter on a small table
scattered debris and papers covering the carpeted floor

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow dark corridor with concrete walls. The player approaches a metal door, opens it, and enters a small messy bedroom lit by a single warm desk lamp. After a brief look at the bed and clutter, the player exits back to the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: larger residential bedroom with workspace and city-view windows

events.description: enters second larger bedroom with green dresser and wall shelves
pans left to reveal desk area with office chair and wall map
approaches windows showing night city lights outside

agents.ego_description: walking down the corridor and entering a larger bedroom, then thoroughly examining the desk, shelves, dresser, and windows

entered.detail: tall cabinet with green glowing drawers and illuminated mirror
floating shelves holding books and decorative bottles
workspace with computer monitor, lamp, and rolling office chair
large windows with blinds showing neon-lit cityscape outside
wooden crate on floor beneath the windows

segments.scene_description: The player walks down the corridor and enters a larger, more organized bedroom with cool ambient lighting. The room features a green dresser with neon accents, wall shelves, a desk with an office chair, and large windows overlooking a night cityscape. The player pans around to examine the workspace and approaches the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: long corridor with ceiling lights leading to common area

events.description: exits second room back into corridor
approaches brighter area at end of corridor

agents.ego_description: exiting the bedroom and walking steadily down the corridor toward a lit common area

entered.detail: flat screen TV mounted on the corridor wall
metal elevator doors at the far end of the hallway

segments.scene_description: The player exits the second bedroom and walks down a long, dimly lit corridor with sporadic ceiling lights. A wall-mounted television is visible on the right as the player approaches a brighter common area at the end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: communal dining area with large illuminated aquarium

events.description: enters large common room with dining area and aquarium
pans left to view large illuminated aquarium with plants

agents.ego_description: entering a spacious common area with a red booth, dining table, and large aquarium, then looking around the space

entered.detail: retro-style red cushioned booth seating along the wall
long wooden table with red stools and items on surface
massive floor-to-ceiling aquarium with plants and blue lighting
stacked cardboard boxes and moving supplies
long fluorescent light fixtures on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player enters a large common area featuring a retro red dining booth, scattered cardboard boxes, and a prominent illuminated aquarium on the left wall. The space has industrial elements with fluorescent lighting and metal shutters. The player pans to examine the aquarium and the elevator door at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic, dimly lit hallway into two contrasting living spaces. It begins in a narrow concrete corridor, moving toward a metal door that opens into a small, cluttered bedroom illuminated by the warm glow of a single desk lamp. After a brief exploration of the messy interior, the camera retreats back into the dark hallway before advancing toward a second doorway. The scene then shifts into a larger, more organized bedroom where the lighting transitions from warm tones to cool ambient hues and neon accents. Finally, the camera pans across a modern workspace and a green dresser before approaching large windows that reveal a sprawling night cityscape.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, dimly lit hallway into a spacious, industrial common area. It begins as the player exits a bedroom and moves down a long corridor where sporadic ceiling lights cast deep shadows past a wall-mounted television. As the camera approaches the end of the hall, the dim lighting gives way to a brighter, open space filled with fluorescent light. The scene then expands to reveal a retro red dining booth and scattered cardboard boxes before the camera pans left to focus on a prominent illuminated aquarium. Finally, the view shifts across the industrial interior toward a metal elevator door at the far end of the room.
